Class AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.application.impl.AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdoptionApplicationService
public class AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl extends Object implements AdoptionApplicationService
Default implementation of AdoptionApplicationService that orchestrates the full adoption request lifecycle: submit, approve, reject, and cancel. On approval, updates both the animal's adopter reference and the adopter's history. Dispatches notifications and records audit entries for every operation.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl

      public AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl(AdoptionService adoptionService, AnimalService animalService, AdopterService adopterService, RequestNotificationService notificationService, AuditService<AdoptionRequest> auditService)
      Constructs an AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl with all required service dependencies. All five services are mandatory; none may be null.
      Parameters:
      adoptionService - the service managing adoption request state; must not be null
      animalService - the service for animal lookups and updates; must not be null
      adopterService - the service for adopter lookups and updates; must not be null
      notificationService - the service for dispatching status-change notifications; must not be null
      auditService - the service for recording audit log entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • submitRequest

      public AdoptionRequest submitRequest(String adopterId, String animalId)
      Submits a new adoption request on behalf of the given adopter for the given animal. Throws an exception if the adopter or animal is not found, or if the animal is not available. Verifies the animal is available before creating and submitting the request.
      Specified by:
      submitRequest in interface AdoptionApplicationService
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter submitting the request; must not be null or blank
      animalId - the ID of the animal being requested; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      the newly created AdoptionRequest

    • approveRequest

      public void approveRequest(String requestId)
      Approves a pending adoption request, marking the animal as adopted and notifying the adopter. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state. Marks the animal as adopted and records the adoption in the adopter's history.
      Specified by:
      approveRequest in interface AdoptionApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to approve; must not be null or blank

    • rejectRequest

      public void rejectRequest(String requestId)
      Rejects a pending adoption request, leaving the animal available for other requests. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      rejectRequest in interface AdoptionApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to reject; must not be null or blank

    • cancelRequest

      public void cancelRequest(String requestId)
      Cancels a pending adoption request before it has been reviewed. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      cancelRequest in interface AdoptionApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to cancel; must not be null or blank

    • listAllRequests

      public List<AdoptionRequest> listAllRequests()
      Returns every adoption request currently in the system. Returns an empty list if no adoption requests have been submitted. Used by the shelter print command to render a system-wide snapshot. Delegates to the underlying AdoptionService.
      Specified by:
      listAllRequests in interface AdoptionApplicationService
      Returns:
      a list of all adoption requests
